caption: A man with a unique, tall, grey, textured hairstyle sits in what appears to be a recording studio or podcast set. He wears glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, a small red patterned bowtie, and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in various framed photos and images. To his right, a white speaker and some fabric items are visible. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller badge that says "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and slightly shifting his expression and head posture, while the camera angle and setting remain static.
